description: Send notifications to your own Streamlabs destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise strmlabs:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channel skips Apprise and POSTs a native Streamlabs Alerts API form payload directly to streamlabs.com.
name: msg-to-streamlabs

request.template: {"urls":"strmlabs://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.access_token_secret }} }/","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

access_token=${ customer_secrets.STREAMLABS_ACCESS_TOKEN }&message={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "") ~= "" and (_body.body or "") ~= "") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}

access_token=${ customer_secrets.STREAMLABS_ACCESS_TOKEN }&message={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "") ~= "" and (_body.body or "") ~= "") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}
